{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Dr. Joaquin Arambula is requesting nearly $10 million for improvements to local police departments in Fresno County.",
    "The existing police department in Parlier was originally designed to function as a senior center and preschool.",
    "Police employees in Parlier have been exposed to attacks, including incidents involving automatic weapons and arson.",
    "The Orange Cove Police Department operates out of a shared facility that is only 2,800 square feet.",
    "The Selma Police Department intends to upgrade its communication system to include an Emergency 911 communication system and a non-emergency system."
  ]
